selections.name: NOTABLE SPEECH
selections.reason: Elite Group 1 winner with exceptional turn of foot. The uphill drag will suit his closing kick perfectly.

selections.name: OPERA BALLO (IRE)
selections.reason: Consistent high-level performer who won the Bet365 Mile readily. Strong class rating and tactical speed.

selections.name: ZEUS OLYMPIOS
selections.reason: Finished a strong second to Notable Speech recently. Reliable and handles the straight mile well.

selections.name: MORE THUNDER (IRE)
selections.reason: Took second near the finish behind Notable Speech in the Lockinge. Proven Group 1 competitor.

danger_horse.name: DAMYSUS
danger_horse.reason: Won the Earl of Sefton comfortably and has the class to hit the board if the pace collapses.

selections.name: GREAT BARRIER REEF (IRE)
selections.reason: Impressive winner of the Gr3 Marble Hill Stakes. Aidan O'Brien trainee with massive upside.

selections.name: NIGHT IN VEGAS (IRE)
selections.reason: Undefeated in two starts, winning cosily both times. High draw could be advantageous on the straight course.

selections.name: CONFUCIUS (IRE)
selections.reason: Broke maiden well and represents elite connections. Drawn high, which fits the Ascot straight course bias.

selections.name: CUT A DASH
selections.reason: Won novice race cosily. Steps up in class but has the speed figures to contend.

danger_horse.name: ADAAY OF SCARLETT (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Kept on well in Listed company last out. Has the experience to outrun his odds.

selections.name: OVERPASS (AUS)
selections.reason: Elite Australian sprinter shipping in. High class rating and proven in massive fields.

selections.name: BIG MOJO (IRE)
selections.reason: Group 1 Betfair Sprint Cup winner. Thrives in these large-field straight sprints.

selections.name: NIGHT RAIDER (IRE)
selections.reason: Won the Temple Stakes (Gr2) recently. Consistent form and handles the distance perfectly.

selections.name: ROSY AFFAIR
selections.reason: Ran on well to win Fillies Listed stakes. Gets a weight break and is in peak form.

danger_horse.name: RAYEVKA (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Won Prix De Saint-Georges (Gr3) in France. Dangerous shipper with tactical speed.

selections.name: BOW ECHO (IRE)
selections.reason: Readily won the 2000 Guineas. The clear class of the field and drawn well to save ground on the round course.

selections.name: GSTAAD
selections.reason: Irish 2000 Guineas winner. Elite battle expected with Bow Echo; gets the rail draw.

selections.name: PUERTO RICO (IRE)
selections.reason: Group 1 winner in France. Strong late pace figures make him a massive threat if the top two duel.

selections.name: TALK OF NEW YORK
selections.reason: Won Listed stakes readily. Improving profile for Charlie Appleby.

danger_horse.name: POWER BLUE (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Group 1 placed and capable of hitting the frame at a price.

selections.name: REACHING HIGH (IRE)
selections.reason: Royal runner with Ryan Moore aboard. Closed well in recent heritage handicap and will relish the extreme distance.

selections.name: BUNTING (FR)
selections.reason: Willie Mullins dual-purpose horse. Always commands respect in these marathon flat handicaps.

selections.name: BEYLERBEYI
selections.reason: Consistent in high-class handicaps. Has the stamina to grind out a finish here.

selections.name: COMFORT ZONE (IRE)
selections.reason: JP McManus runner. Stayed on well in premier handicap last out.

danger_horse.name: PUTURHANDSTOGETHER (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Joseph O'Brien runner who has been competitive in premier handicaps and gets a light weight.

selections.name: ADELAIDE RIVER (IRE)
selections.reason: Group 1 placed globally. Drops into Listed company here which represents a massive class relief.

selections.name: ANCIENT WISDOM (FR)
selections.reason: Godolphin runner with strong Group 1 back form. Drawn well on the round course.

selections.name: PERSICA (IRE)
selections.reason: Won the Gr3 Diomed Stakes. Overcame trouble in the past and has a strong late kick.

selections.name: ARABIAN LIGHT
selections.reason: Solid handicap form in Dubai and the UK. Will be running on late.

danger_horse.name: DIVIDEND
danger_horse.reason: Good Meydan form and gets the inside rail draw to save ground.

selections.name: VALIANCY (IRE)
selections.reason: William Haggas and James Doyle team up. Won cosily last out and looks ahead of his handicap mark.

selections.name: STRESSFREE (FR)
selections.reason: Consistent in class 2 handicaps. Has the stamina and tactical speed to feature.

selections.name: DAIQUIRI BAY
selections.reason: Always doing enough in recent wins. Steps up in trip but pedigree suggests it will suit.

selections.name: GAMRAI
selections.reason: Headed entering the finish last out but gets a great inside draw to save ground over this trip.

danger_horse.name: PADDY THE SQUIRE
danger_horse.reason: Stayed on well in recent starts and has a solid foundation for this marathon test.
